outputs.main.sas:
# Load required libraries
library(rtables)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(emmeans)
library(car)
library(lazyWeave)
library(pharmaversetheme)

# Read ADADAS dataset
adadas <- read_sas("adadas.sas7bdat")

# Filter to Efficacy population
adadas_eff <- adadas %>% 
  filter(POP EFF == "Y")

# Implement LOCF imputation for Week 24
adadas_locf <- adadas_eff %>%
  filter(AVISIT %in% c("BASELINE", "WEEK 24")) %>%
  group_by(USUBJID, TRT01A) %>%
  arrange(USUBJID, AVISITN) %>%
  fill(AVAL, .direction = "down") %>%
  filter(AVISIT == "WEEK 24" | AVISIT == "BASELINE") %>%
  ungroup()

# Create baseline and week 24 datasets
baseline <- adadas_locf %>% 
  filter(AVISIT == "BASELINE") %>% 
  select(USUBJID, TRT01A, BASE = AVAL)

week24 <- adadas_locf %>% 
  filter(AVISIT == "WEEK 24") %>% 
  select(USUBJID, TRT01A, W24 = AVAL)

# Merge to create analysis dataset
analysis_data <- baseline %>% 
  full_join(week24, by = c("USUBJID", "TRT01A")) %>% 
  mutate(CHANGE = W24 - BASE,
         TRT = factor(TRT01A, levels = c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose")),
         TRT_NUM = as.numeric(TRT)) # For dose-response trend test

# Add site group information (assuming it's in ADSL)
adsl <- read_sas("adsl.sas7bdat") %>% 
  select(USUBJID, SITEGR1)

analysis_data <- analysis_data %>% 
  left_join(adsl, by = "USUBJID")

# Perform ANCOVA model
model <- lm(CHANGE ~ TRT + SITEGR1 + BASE, data = analysis_data)

# Get Type III SS
type3_ss <- Anova(model, type = "III")

# Dose-response trend test
trend_model <- lm(CHANGE ~ TRT_NUM + SITEGR1 + BASE, data = analysis_data)
trend_anova <- Anova(trend_model, type = "III")
trend_pval <- trend_anova["TRT_NUM", "Pr(>F)"]

# Get LS means and pairwise comparisons
ls_means <- emmeans(model, ~ TRT)
pairwise <- pairs(ls_means)

# Extract results for pairwise comparisons
xan_low_vs_pbo <- summary(pairs(ls_means))[1, ]
xan_high_vs_pbo <- summary(pairs(ls_means))[2, ]
xan_high_vs_low <- summary(pairs(ls_means))[3, ]

# Calculate summary statistics by treatment group
summary_stats <- analysis_data %>%
  group_by(TRT) %>%
  summarise(
    n_base = n(),
    mean_base = mean(BASE, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_base = sd(BASE, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_base = median(BASE, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_base = min(BASE, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_base = max(BASE, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    n_w24 = sum(!is.na(W24)),
    mean_w24 = mean(W24, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_w24 = sd(W24, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_w24 = median(W24, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_w24 = min(W24, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_w24 = max(W24, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    n_change = sum(!is.na(CHANGE)),
    mean_change = mean(CHANGE, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_change = sd(CHANGE, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_change = median(CHANGE, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_change = min(CHANGE, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_change = max(CHANGE, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Create the table using rtables
build_table <- function() {
  lyt <- basic_table() %>%
    split_cols_by("TRT") %>%
    split_rows_by("Analysis", nested = FALSE) %>%
    analyze("n_base", afun = function(x) rcell(x, format = "xx")) %>%
    analyze("mean_base", afun = function(x) rcell(mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx.xx")) %>%
    analyze("sd_base", afun = function(x) rcell(sd(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx.xx")) %>%
    analyze("median_base", afun = function(x) rcell(median(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx.xx")) %>%
    analyze("min_base", afun = function(x) rcell(min(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx")) %>%
    analyze("max_base", afun = function(x) rcell(max(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx")) %>%
    analyze("n_w24", afun = function(x) rcell(x, format = "xx")) %>%
    analyze("mean_w24", afun = function(x) rcell(mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx.xx")) %>%
    analyze("sd_w24", afun = function(x) rcell(sd(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx.xx")) %>%
    analyze("median_w24", afun = function(x) rcell(median(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx.xx")) %>%
    analyze("min_w24", afun = function(x) rcell(min(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx")) %>%
    analyze("max_w24", afun = function(x) rcell(max(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx")) %>%
    analyze("n_change", afun = function(x) rcell(x, format = "xx")) %>%
    analyze("mean_change", afun = function(x) rcell(mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx.xx")) %>%
    analyze("sd_change", afun = function(x) rcell(sd(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx.xx")) %>%
    analyze("median_change", afun = function(x) rcell(median(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx.xx")) %>%
    analyze("min_change", afun = function(x) rcell(min(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx")) %>%
    analyze("max_change", afun = function(x) rcell(max(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx"))
  
  # Create a custom table structure to match the mock shell
  tbl <- rtable(
    "Baseline" = rrow(
      "n" = rcell(summary_stats$n_base),
      "Mean (SD)" = rcell(paste0(round(summary_stats$mean_base, 2), " (", round(summary_stats$sd_base, 2), ")")),
      "Median (Range)" = rcell(paste0(round(summary_stats$median_base, 2), " (", round(summary_stats$min_base, 0), ";", round(summary_stats$max_base, 0), ")"))
    ),
    "Week 24" = rrow(
      "n" = rcell(summary_stats$n_w24),
      "Mean (SD)" = rcell(paste0(round(summary_stats$mean_w24, 2), " (", round(summary_stats$sd_w24, 2), ")")),
      "Median (Range)" = rcell(paste0(round(summary_stats$median_w24, 2), " (", round(summary_stats$min_w24, 0), ";", round(summary_stats$max_w24, 0), ")"))
    ),
    "Change from Baseline" = rrow(
      "n" = rcell(summary_stats$n_change),
      "Mean (SD)" = rcell(paste0(round(summary_stats$mean_change, 2), " (", round(summary_stats$sd_change, 2), ")")),
      "Median (Range)" = rcell(paste0(round(summary_stats$median_change, 2), " (", round(summary_stats$min_change, 0), ";", round(summary_stats$max_change, 0), ")"))
    ),
    "Statistical Analysis" = rrow(
      "p-value(Dose Response) [1][2]" = rcell(c("", trend_pval, trend_pval)),
      "p-value(Xan - Placebo) [1][3]" = rcell(c("", xan_low_vs_pbo$p.value, xan_high_vs_pbo$p.value)),
      "Diff of LS Means (SE)" = rcell(c("", 
                                       paste0(round(xan_low_vs_pbo$estimate, 1), " (", round(xan_low_vs_pbo$SE, 2), ")"),
                                       paste0(round(xan_high_vs_pbo$estimate, 1), " (", round(xan_high_vs_pbo$SE, 2), ")"))),
      "95% CI" = rcell(c("", 
                        paste0("(", round(xan_low_vs_pbo$estimate - 1.96 * xan_low_vs_pbo$SE, 1), "; ", 
                               round(xan_low_vs_pbo$estimate + 1.96 * xan_low_vs_pbo$SE, 1), ")"),
                        paste0("(", round(xan_high_vs_pbo$estimate - 1.96 * xan_high_vs_pbo$SE, 1), "; ", 
                               round(xan_high_vs_pbo$estimate + 1.96 * xan_high_vs_pbo$SE, 1), ")"))),
      "p-value(Xan High - Xan Low) [1][3]" = rcell(c("", "", xan_high_vs_low$p.value)),
      "Diff of LS Means (SE)" = rcell(c("", "", 
                                       paste0(round(xan_high_vs_low$estimate, 1), " (", round(xan_high_vs_low$SE, 2), ")"))),
      "95% CI" = rcell(c("", "", 
                        paste0("(", round(xan_high_vs_low$estimate - 1.96 * xan_high_vs_low$SE, 1), "; ", 
                               round(xan_high_vs_low$estimate + 1.96 * xan_high_vs_low$SE, 1), ")")))
    ),
    col_labels = rrow(
      "Placebo" = "",
      "Xanomeline Low Dose" = "",
      "Xanomeline High Dose" = ""
    )
  )
  
  # Add column headers with N
  col_headers <- c(
    paste0("Placebo (N=", summary_stats$n_base[1], ")"),
    paste0("Xanomeline Low Dose (N=", summary_stats$n_base[2], ")"),
    paste0("Xanomeline High Dose (N=", summary_stats$n_base[3], ")")
  )
  
  colnames(tbl) <- col_headers
  
  return(tbl)
}

# Generate the table
primary_table <- build_table()

# Add table title and footnotes
table_title <- "Primary Endpoint Analysis: ADAS Cog (11) - Change from Baseline to Week 24 - LOCF"

footnotes <- list(
  "[1] Based on Analysis of covariance (ANCOVA) model with treatment and site group as factors and baseline value as a covariate.",
  "[2] Test for a non-zero coefficient for treatment (dose) as a continuous variable.",
  "[3] Pairwise comparison with treatment as a categorical variable: p-values without adjustment for multiple comparisons."
)

# Output as RTF
rtf_file <- "tlf_14-3-01_primary_endpoint.rtf"

rtf <- rtf_doc(
  title = table_title,
  font_size = 9,
  orientation = "portrait",
  margin = c(1, 1, 1, 1)
) %>%
  add_content(primary_table) %>%
  add_content(footnotes, content_type = "footnote") %>%
  add_content("Protocol: CDISCPILOT01", content_type = "paragraph") %>%
  add_content("Population: Efficacy", content_type = "paragraph") %>%
  add_content("Program: tlf-primary.R", content_type = "paragraph") %>%
  add_content("Source: ADADAS, ADSL", content_type = "paragraph") %>%
  write_rtf(file = rtf_file)

cat("RTF table generated successfully:", rtf_file)
